title: Chest helper
description: Chest Helper is a client-side Fabric mod that remembers opened storage containers and turns them into a searchable item list
body:
**Features**
- Remembers opened chests, barrels, and shulker boxes per server, world, and dimension.
- Saves remembered container data between game sessions.
- Shows a searchable GUI with item names, icons, total stored amount, and amount currently available nearby.
- Displays large counts in compact form, such as 125, 1k, or 1.5k.
- Supports precise item matching with stack components, so renamed items, enchanted items, potions, books, tools, and filled shulker boxes are not merged only by item ID.
- Lets you take items from remembered containers within 6 blocks using normal client inventory actions.
- Hides the opened container screen during automatic pickup and shows a short result message instead.
- Updates remembered contents after taking or moving items.
- Supports bulk matching actions:
- Up arrow: deposit matching inventory items into nearby remembered containers that already contain those item types.
- Down arrow: withdraw matching items from nearby remembered containers into your inventory.
- Includes optional menu reopening after taking items.
- Includes a temporary x-ray highlight button for the container that stores a selected item.
- Can reset saved data or open the data folder from the GUI.



**Controls**
- Default B: open Chest Helper.
- Left click an item row: take one stack from nearby remembered containers.
- Right click an item row: take the selected amount.
- Shift + click an item row: take all matching items from nearby remembered containers.
- Shift + mouse wheel: change the right-click take amount.
- Eye button near an item location: highlight the related container for 5 seconds.



**Settings**
- Reopen Chest Helper after taking items.
- Ignore ender chests.
- List radius: hides remembered containers farther than the configured distance from the GUI list. The default is 160 blocks.
- Show or hide coordinates in item rows.
